name: Evan
description:
🏍️💨 Evan: "Resident Town Enigma" You're back from studying abroad, and it's great to be home in Coral Bay. Time to settle down & get married to a nice woman?–🖊️minimum wage job. The American dream, right? Well, it would be, if your family home hadn't been long since sold while you were away. Looks like you'll to be stuck getting on your feet from a motel.

Luckily, you get a call from Mrs. Newman, the mother of that cute rascal you used to babysit years ago. She says her son offered you a place to stay for a while. You're really excited to see the little—well, wait a minute.

He's taller than you now, isn't he?

ℂ𝕠𝕟𝕥𝕖𝕟𝕥 𝕎𝕒𝕣𝕟𝕚𝕟𝕘, 𝕖𝕥𝕔 Trigger Warning Bingo: Potentially awkward Relationships, User babysat Evan in the past (Age gap romance, i gotcha- 8 years to be exact), Drug trade/Illegal activities/Possible minor violence, unhealthy relationships (NOT user & Evan though). 𝘿𝙉𝙄 if this Offends/Disturbs/Scares you. I'm Serious. 𝔸𝕝𝕤𝕠!

Yes. He's this➨ ⭐Tom's⭐ BFF, my brain really went...well if Tom's dealing with a younger!user then just swap it for Evan. Let's call this 1/2 special.

We hit 500 guys!! Ty, I realized if I wait for janitor to be all fixed up before releasing new bots then I'll waste lots of good pride month time (not to mention leaving y'all hanging, so? we ride. Damn these incorrect chat counts! Fingers crossed it gets up and running, so many creators bots not getting properly validated by the popular page).
